dataset.name: Canonical Beacon
dataset.description: Events derived from the finalized beacon chain. This data is only derived by a single instance, are deduped, and are more complete and reliable than the beacon_api_ tables. These tables can be reliably JOINed on to hydrate other tables with information

tables.name: canonical_beacon_block
tables.description: Contains beacon block from a beacon node.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: When this row was last updated

columns.name: slot
columns.description: The slot number from beacon block payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: The epoch number from beacon block payload

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: The root hash of the beacon block

columns.name: block_version
columns.description: The version of the beacon block

columns.name: block_total_bytes
columns.description: The total bytes of the beacon block payload

columns.name: block_total_bytes_compressed
columns.description: The total bytes of the beacon block payload when compressed using snappy

columns.name: parent_root
columns.description: The root hash of the parent beacon block

columns.name: state_root
columns.description: The root hash of the beacon state at this block

columns.name: proposer_index
columns.description: The index of the validator that proposed the beacon block

columns.name: eth1_data_block_hash
columns.description: The block hash of the associated execution block

columns.name: eth1_data_deposit_root
columns.description: The root of the deposit tree in the associated execution block

columns.name: execution_payload_block_hash
columns.description: The block hash of the execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_block_number
columns.description: The block number of the execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_fee_recipient
columns.description: The recipient of the fee for this execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_base_fee_per_gas
columns.description: Base fee per gas for execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_blob_gas_used
columns.description: Gas used for blobs in execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_excess_blob_gas
columns.description: Excess gas used for blobs in execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_gas_limit
columns.description: Gas limit for execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_gas_used
columns.description: Gas used for execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_state_root
columns.description: The state root of the execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_parent_hash
columns.description: The parent hash of the execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_transactions_count
columns.description: The transaction count of the execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_transactions_total_bytes
columns.description: The transaction total bytes of the execution payload

columns.name: execution_payload_transactions_total_bytes_compressed
columns.description: The transaction total bytes of the execution payload when compressed using snappy

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: slot
columns.description: Slot number in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: committee_index
columns.description: The committee index in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: validators
columns.description: The validator indices in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: The epoch number in the beacon API committee payload

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

tables.name: canonical_beacon_block_execution_transaction
tables.description: Contains execution transaction from a beacon block.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: When this row was last updated

columns.name: slot
columns.description: The slot number from beacon block payload

columns.name: slot_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the slot started

columns.name: epoch
columns.description: The epoch number from beacon block payload

columns.name: epoch_start_date_time
columns.description: The wall clock time when the epoch started

columns.name: block_root
columns.description: The root hash of the beacon block

columns.name: block_version
columns.description: The version of the beacon block

columns.name: position
columns.description: The position of the transaction in the beacon block

columns.name: hash
columns.description: The hash of the transaction

columns.name: from
columns.description: The address of the account that sent the transaction

columns.name: to
columns.description: The address of the account that is the transaction recipient

columns.name: nonce
columns.description: The nonce of the sender account at the time of the transaction

columns.name: gas_price
columns.description: The gas price of the transaction in wei

columns.name: gas
columns.description: The maximum gas provided for the transaction execution

columns.name: gas_tip_cap
columns.description: The priority fee (tip) the user has set for the transaction

columns.name: gas_fee_cap
columns.description: The max fee the user has set for the transaction

columns.name: value
columns.description: The value transferred with the transaction in wei

columns.name: type
columns.description: The type of the transaction

columns.name: size
columns.description: The size of the transaction data in bytes

columns.name: call_data_size
columns.description: The size of the call data of the transaction in bytes

columns.name: blob_gas
columns.description: The maximum gas provided for the blob transaction execution

columns.name: blob_gas_fee_cap
columns.description: The max fee the user has set for the transaction

columns.name: blob_hashes
columns.description: The hashes of the blob commitments for blob transactions

columns.name: blob_sidecars_size
columns.description: The total size of the sidecars for blob transactions in bytes

columns.name: blob_sidecars_empty_size
columns.description: The total empty size of the sidecars for blob transactions in bytes

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

tables.name: canonical_beacon_validators_pubkeys
